testCases.title: Verify login with valid username and password
steps: Open the login page URL in a browser
Enter username haklarr in the username field
Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application home/dashboard page.

testCases.title: Verify login failure with incorrect username and valid password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating incorrect username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login failure with valid username and incorrect password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating incorrect username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login failure when both username and password are incorrect
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating incorrect username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify validation when username and password fields are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation message appears indicating username and password are required.

testCases.title: Verify validation when username is blank and password is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Validation message appears indicating username is required and login is not allowed.

testCases.title: Verify validation when password is blank and username is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Validation message appears indicating password is required and login is not allowed.

testCases.title: Verify username field accepts leading and trailing spaces
testCases.expectedResult: System trims whitespace and authenticates the user successfully if credentials are valid.

testCases.title: Verify password field with leading and trailing spaces
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails if spaces are treated as characters or succeeds if spaces are trimmed based on system behavior.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt using only whitespace characters
testCases.expectedResult: Validation error appears indicating username and password cannot be blank or whitespace.

testCases.title: Verify login with very long username input
steps: Enter a very long username string exceeding typical length limits
testCases.expectedResult: System prevents excessive input or displays validation without crashing or breaking UI.

testCases.title: Verify login with very long password input
steps: Enter a very long password string exceeding typical limits
testCases.expectedResult: System handles long password input safely and shows appropriate login failure or validation.

testCases.title: Verify login with special characters in username
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails gracefully and system handles special characters without UI errors.

testCases.title: Verify login with special characters in password
testCases.expectedResult: System processes input normally and login fails unless the password exactly matches stored credentials.

testCases.title: Verify login button is visible on login page
testCases.expectedResult: Username field, password field, and Login button are visible and properly aligned on the page.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Entered password characters are masked or hidden.

testCases.title: Verify pressing Enter key submits login form
steps: Press the Enter key on keyboard
testCases.expectedResult: Login form submits and user is logged in successfully.

testCases.title: Verify multiple rapid clicks on login button
steps: Rapidly click the Login button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: System processes login once and prevents duplicate submissions or errors.

testCases.title: Verify copy paste of credentials into fields
steps: Copy username haklarr and paste into username field
Copy password Icstunnel1 and paste into password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login succeeds and user is redirected to the dashboard.

testCases.title: Verify case sensitivity of username
testCases.expectedResult: Login succeeds or fails based on system case sensitivity rules but does not break authentication flow.

testCases.title: Verify case sensitivity of password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails because password case does not match.

testCases.title: Verify login page loads successfully
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads without errors and displays the login form.
